projects.title: My Stickies
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce web app using React and Node.js, featuring product catalog, cart, order management, and JWT-based admin authentication.
projects.longDescription: Full-stack e-commerce web application built with React and Node.js, featuring a product catalogue, shopping cart, order management, and a secure admin dashboard with JWT authentication.

projects.title: Epay Store
projects.description: A full-stack MERN e-commerce platform with multi-currency support, product reviews, JWT-authenticated admin dashboard, email notifications, and Docker/Nginx-ready deployment.
projects.longDescription: A full-stack MERN e-commerce platform featuring multi-currency pricing (SYP/USD), product ratings & reviews, a secure JWT-authenticated admin dashboard for inventory and order management, automated HTML email order notifications via Nodemailer, and Docker/Nginx-ready deployment configuration targeting Render, Vercel, and MongoDB Atlas.

projects.title: EduPath
projects.description: A simple study platform where teachers manage subjects, sections, lessons, and MCQ tests; students take tests and see their marks.
projects.longDescription: A Full-Stack educational platform using Python (Flask) and MongoDB, implementing a role-based system for teachers and students. Designed RESTful routes and backend logic to manage hierarchical course structures (subjects → sections → lessons) and dynamic quiz generation. Integrated database operations using MongoDB for storing users, content, and results, with efficient querying and data relationships. Developed interactive frontend pages with form handling, session-based authentication, and real-time score tracking to enhance user experience.

projects.title: C++ debugger
projects.description: Lightweight header-only C++ utility providing a variadic debug() macro for printing variable names and values (including STL containers) to stderr.
projects.longDescription: A lightweight C++ header-only utility that provides a variadic `debug()` macro for pretty-printing variable names and their values to `stderr` during local development, with support for all primitive types and iterable STL containers.
